planning.description: Emit plan.request before iterating; defers to a planner plugin.

model_role.description: Role name from core.models used for the agent's LLM calls.

system_prompt_file.description: Path to a file containing the system prompt.

parallel_tools.description: Run multiple tool calls from a single LLM response in parallel.

max_concurrent.description: Concurrency ceiling when parallel_tools is true.

tool_choice.description: Constrain tool selection: string shorthand (auto|required|any|none) or a map with mode/name/sequence.
